external_services.service_name: Technical Assistance on the Preparation, Review and Approval of Barangay/ SK Annual and Supplemental Budget
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Technical Assistance on the Preparation_ Review and Approval of Barangay_ SK Annual and Supplemental Budget

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Barangay Annual Budget: Transmittal letter, Appropriation Ordinance, Budget Message, BBPF Nos. 01, 02, 02-A, 03, Expenditure Program, AIP (including BDRRMFIP, BDRRP, GAD Plan, BCPC Plan), Resolutions, and Annexes (Income Statement, Past Year Exp., Monetization, Free Resources, PPMP, APP, Nutrition Plan) – 2 original copies, 3 photocopies each
SK Annual Budget: SK BBPF No. 02, 03, ABYIP, Resolutions (CBYDP, ABYIP approval, 10% SK Fund), PPMP, APP – 2 original copies, 3 photocopies each

Barangay Supplemental Budget: Transmittal Letter, Appropriation Ordinance, Cover letter, BSBPF No. 01, 02, Supplemental AIP, Resolutions, PPMP, Supplemental APP – 2 original copies, 3 photocopies each
SK Supplemental Budget: SK BSBPF No. 01, 02, Supplemental ABYIP, Resolutions, Annexes (Computation of Surplus, Summary of Expenses, PPMP, Supplemental APP) – 2 original copies, 3 photocopies each

steps.agency_action: 1. Give the logbook to the client
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Administrative Officer, Administrative Officer V, Administrative Assistant II (Lipa City Budget Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Secure Barangay Annual/ Supplemental Budget Preparation Form at the City Budget Office or through digital platform
steps.agency_action: 2. Provide forms to requesting barangay and SK officials
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Administrative Officer, Administrative Officer V, Administrative Assistant II (Lipa City Budget Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Accomplish the Annual/ Supplemental Budget Preparation Forms as required by RA 7160
steps.agency_action: 3. Renders technical assistance (Workshop, encoding guidance for Plantilla/AIP/APP/PPMP, computation of resources, coding of accounts, 20% Dev Fund, 5% BDRRM, etc.)
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Administrative Officer, Administrative Officer V, Administrative Assistant II (Lipa City Budget Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Submit the approved Annual/ Supplemental Budget to the Sangguniang Panlungsod thru the Lipa City Budget Office for review
steps.agency_action: 4. Receive and verify completeness of documents and signatures (incomplete submissions are returned in writing)
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Administrative Officer, Administrative Officer V, Administrative Assistant II (Lipa City Budget Office)

steps.client_step: 5. Wait for review action/ SP resolution of Barangay/SK Annual and Supplemental Budget
steps.agency_action: 5.1.a/b. Review Annual Appropriation (Income, Expenditures, Mandatory Obligations, specialized funds); 5.2.a/b. Review Supplemental Budget (Funding sources, project alignment); 5.2.c. Transmit to SP; 5.2.d. Review and approve pursuant to Section 458 of LGC
steps.person_responsible: City Budget Officer, Asst. City Budget Officer, Administrative Officer V, Administrative Assistant II, SP Staff

steps.client_step: 6. Secure a copy of the SP resolution at the Sangguniang Panlungsod
steps.agency_action: 6. Issue Certified True Copy of SP Resolution
steps.person_responsible: Secretary to the SP (Office of the Secretary to the Sangguniang Panlungsod)
